content.text: I need to create a method that executes an HTTP request and automatically sets a specific User-Agent if none is already defined in my headers.
If I call this method without passing any arguments for 'headers', will it still add that User-Agent?
Yes, because the headers dictionary defaults to an empty dict when called with no parameters, and the logic in the function explicitly checks if the User-Agent exists before adding it.
That makes much more sense, thanks!
